Short Description: Tuscan Chicken with a Creamy Sun Dried Tomato Sauce and Roasted Zucchini and Roasted Cremini Mushrooms over Basmati Rice
Long Description: Tuscan style chicken finished with a creamy sun dried tomato sauce, served with roasted zucchini and roasted cremini mushrooms over basmati rice for a rich, savory plate with a warm, Italian finish.

Short Description: Blackened Chicken with a Basil Pesto Aioli and Roasted Butternut Squash and Roasted Zucchini over Jasmine Rice
Long Description: Seasoned blackened chicken finished with a creamy basil pesto aioli, served with roasted butternut squash and roasted zucchini over jasmine rice for a fresh, herbaceous plate with a smooth, aromatic finish.

Short Description: Braised Short Ribs with a Balsamic Fig Glaze and Roasted Beets and Roasted Asparagus over Roasted Baby Potatoes
Long Description: Tender braised short ribs finished with a sweet balsamic fig glaze, served with roasted beets and roasted asparagus over roasted baby potatoes for a rich, elevated plate with a bold, savory finish.

Short Description: Seared Salmon with a Blood Orange Glaze and Roasted Rainbow Carrots and Roasted Broccoli over Wild Rice
Long Description: Seared salmon finished with a bright blood orange glaze, served with roasted rainbow carrots and roasted broccoli over wild rice for a light, citrus forward plate with a vibrant, refreshing finish.

Short Description: Za'atar Crusted Tofu with Crispy Za'atar Chickpeas and a Lemon Tahini Sauce and Roasted Cauliflower over White Quinoa
Long Description: Crispy za'atar crusted tofu with roasted chickpeas finished with a bright lemon tahini sauce, served with roasted cauliflower over white quinoa for a warm, Mediterranean plate with a zesty, nutty finish.

Short Description: A dense high protein and collagen rich ginger miso bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: A dense, high protein, and collagen rich ginger miso bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours with fresh ginger, white miso, and warming spices.

Short Description: Strawberry chia pudding with a matcha cream layer and fresh strawberries
Long Description: A creamy strawberry chia pudding layered with a whipped matcha cream and topped with fresh strawberries.
